wizard.title: Migrate a Docker deployment
wizard.intro: Inspect this server's Docker and adopt its containers as an Openship project. Inspection is read-only — nothing changes on the server until you deploy.
wizard.killOriginals: Stop & remove old containers once the new deployment is verified

run.title: Migrating your stack
run.moving_data: Moving volume data to the target…
run.awaiting_cutover: The new deployment is live — verify it, then finish
run.rolled_back: Rolled back — your original containers were restarted
run.downtimeNote: Original containers are stopped during the move; expect brief downtime until the new deployment is live.

cutover.title: Finish migration
cutover.warning: The new deployment is live on the target server. You can stop & remove the original containers now, or keep them (stopped) as a safety net and remove them later.

discover.buildBlocked: Built from source — can't migrate yet (publish an image first)
discover.nothing: No adoptable Docker containers were found on this server.
discover.otherComposeHint: Part of {group} — add a separate project to import it
discover.emptyProject: No services selected yet — pick from the left.
discover.volumeCopyHint: Take over reuses the existing volume in place. Copy duplicates it into a new Openship volume and leaves the original untouched (uses extra disk).
discover.alreadyManaged: {count} container(s) already managed by Openship were skipped.

entry.cardDesc: Migrate a running Docker or Compose deployment into Openship.
